values.content:
Eres el director creativo de Propulsar.ai, agencia de automatizaciones IA para PYMEs.

Tu tarea es generar prompts de imagen para cada slide de un carrusel de Instagram/Facebook, más los captions para ambas plataformas.

PRIMERO elige la estructura de carrusel más adecuada para el tema y tipo:
- narrativo: cuenta una historia con arco (inicio → desarrollo → resolución)
- listicle: lista de tips, herramientas o beneficios numerados
- paso-a-paso: instrucciones secuenciales para lograr algo
- antes-después: contraste entre una situación actual y la transformación
- pregunta-respuesta: hook con pregunta, slides respondiendo, CTA final

IDENTIDAD VISUAL PROPULSAR (aplicar en CADA prompt sin excepción):
- Fondo oscuro profundo: #1a1a2e
- Gradiente principal: púrpura #6B46C1 → magenta #EC4899
- Tipografía bold sans-serif en español, legible, prominente
- Formato cuadrado 1:1
- Estética profesional tech/AI, alto contraste, ultra-detailed, 4K quality

REGLAS DE TEXTO EN IMAGEN (CRÍTICO):
1. El texto_overlay es el texto EXACTO que aparecerá visible en la imagen. Máximo 6-8 palabras. Si necesitás más, dividí en más slides.
2. En el campo prompt, el texto en español va PRIMERO entre comillas dobles, usando el patrón: Text says: "[texto_overlay exacto]". Después describí el visual.
3. NUNCA incluir texto en inglés visible en la imagen. Todo texto visible debe ser en español castellano.
4. Prohibido usar texto lorem ipsum, texto decorativo ilegible, o texto de relleno.

REGLAS GENERALES:
1. Cada campo prompt debe ser COMPLETAMENTE autocontenido con TODAS las restricciones de estilo. Prohibido usar "same as above", "idem" o referencias a otros slides.
2. El array slides debe tener EXACTAMENTE el número de slides solicitados.
3. Los prompt van en inglés (excepto el texto visible que va en español entre comillas).
4. Los texto_overlay van en español.
5. Respondé con JSON puro sin markdown, sin bloques ```json.

FORMATO DE RESPUESTA:
{
  "estructura": "narrativo|listicle|paso-a-paso|antes-después|pregunta-respuesta",
  "instagram_caption": "caption completo con hook <125 chars, 150-300 palabras, párrafos cortos, 8-12 hashtags, máx 3 emojis al inicio de línea, CTA claro",
  "facebook_caption": "caption 100-200 palabras, 3-5 hashtags, pregunta para comentarios al final, CTA",
  "slides": [
    {
      "slide_num": 1,
      "texto_overlay": "máx 6-8 palabras en español",
      "prompt": "Text says: \"[texto_overlay exacto aquí]\". Dark background #1a1a2e, bold white sans-serif typography centered, purple #6B46C1 to magenta #EC4899 gradient glow, professional AI/tech aesthetic, ultra-detailed, crisp text, square 1:1, no other text visible. [descripción visual específica del slide]."
    }
  ]
}

EJEMPLO DE UN BUEN PROMPT:
Text says: "Automatiza tu WhatsApp". Dark background #1a1a2e, bold white sans-serif typography centered, purple #6B46C1 to magenta #EC4899 gradient glow behind text, professional AI/tech aesthetic, minimalist icons of chat bubbles and automation gears, ultra-detailed, crisp text, square 1:1, no other text visible.

nodes.name: 🔤 Ideogram — Slide
nodes.notes: Ideogram v2 per carousel slide — called once per slide via SplitInBatches loop

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "prompt": "{{ $json.image_prompt }} — style: dark background #1a1a2e, purple to magenta gradient accents, professional high-quality social media graphic, ultra detailed, 4K",
  "image_size": "square_hd",
  "num_inference_steps": 28,
  "guidance_scale": 3.5,
  "num_images": 1,
  "enable_safety_checker": true
}

nodes.name: ⚡ Flux 2 Pro (FAL.AI)
nodes.notes:
FAL model: fal-ai/flux-pro/v1.1
Costo: ~$0.03/img
Fortaleza: fotorrealismo premium

nodes.name: 🔤 Ideogram v3
nodes.notes:
Costo: ~$0.06/img
Fortaleza: texto legible en imagen (90-95% precisión)
Requiere IDEOGRAM_API_KEY

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "prompt": "{{ $json.image_prompt }} — ultra high quality, dark background #1a1a2e, purple magenta gradient accents, professional social media graphic, 4K resolution, photorealistic",
  "num_images": 1,
  "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
  "output_format": "png",
  "safety_tolerance": "4"
}

nodes.name: 🍌 Nano Banana Pro (FAL.AI)
nodes.notes:
FAL model: fal-ai/nano-banana (Gemini 3 Pro Image)
Costo: ~$0.15/img
Fortaleza: razonamiento visual, 4K, alto impacto
Misma FAL_API_KEY que Flux

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ session_id: 'propulsar_' + Date.now(), approval_number: $json.approval_number, topic: $json.topic, type: $json.type, angle: $json.angle || null, platforms: $json.platforms || [], image_model: $json.image_model, image_url: $json.image_url || null, final_image_url: $json.final_image_url, instagram_caption: ($json.instagram && $json.instagram.caption) || null, facebook_caption: ($json.facebook && $json.facebook.caption) || null, status: 'pending', publish_at: $json.publish_at || 'now' }) }}

nodes.name: 💾 Guardar sesión Supabase
nodes.notes: Inserts pending approval session into content_sessions (flat schema — instagram_caption/facebook_caption strings, not nested). Built as HTTP Request (not Code) because n8n task runner sandbox blocks require('https'), global fetch, and $helpers.httpRequest. Response = array of the inserted row.

nodes.name: 🔗 Re-attach session data
nodes.notes: Supabase HTTP Request replaced the item with the inserted row (flat schema — no nested instagram/facebook objects). Re-attach the pre-insert data via cross-ref to Normalizar URL imagen so downstream nodes (Preparar mensaje WA, etc.) keep working with the nested object shape. Adds session_id + supabase_row_id from the insert response.

nodes.name: 📨 Webhook — Reply WA
nodes.notes: Configurar esta URL en YCloud → Webhooks → Incoming Messages

nodes.name: 🔍 Recuperar sesión Supabase
nodes.notes: GET pending session from content_sessions, filtered by approval_number = phone + status=pending. Uses PostgREST Accept header 'application/vnd.pgrst.object+json' so response is a SINGLE object (not array), giving downstream nodes the flat session directly. Empty result → 406 → execution fails with clear error (same as the old Code node behavior). Built as HTTP Request because n8n task runner sandbox blocks every HTTP helper inside Code nodes.

nodes.name: 🔧 Prep Re-host Input
nodes.notes: Normalizes single-post (final_image_url) into the sub-workflow input shape. Phase 7: carousel guard removed — carousel path now handled upstream by 🔀 ¿Formato Carrusel?. Passes all other fields through so downstream nodes retain topic/type/angle/text.

nodes.name: 🔁 Re-host Images
nodes.notes: Calls the Re-host Images sub-workflow (n8n workflow ID BIaG266Q6AZpv4Sq). workflowInputs.mappingMode MUST be 'passthrough' because the sub-workflow trigger uses inputSource: passthrough — using 'defineBelow' with an empty value would send empty input and the sub-workflow's Explode node would throw. Output: { blob_urls, post_id }. NOTE: Execute Workflow replaces the item with the sub-workflow output, so downstream nodes no longer see topic/type/angle/etc. — that's why we need the '🔗 Merge Rehost Output' node next. If sub-workflow throws StopAndError, this node fails and the main execution aborts — Google Sheets Log and any Meta publish nodes will NOT run.

nodes.name: 🔗 Merge Rehost Output
nodes.notes: Re-attaches original session metadata (from 🔧 Prep Re-host Input) to the sub-workflow output (blob_urls, post_id). Without this, Execute Workflow replaces the item with only { blob_urls, post_id }, and Google Sheets Log would write blank columns. Uses a Set node (no jsCode) to avoid any env concern. If the Wizard brief ever adds new session fields, extend this node's assignments array accordingly.

parameters.jsCode:
console.log('Rechazado:', $json.body?.whatsappInboundMessage?.from, new Date().toISOString());
return [{ json: { status:'rejected', ts: new Date().toISOString() } }];

nodes.name: 📤 Enviar imagen WA
nodes.notes: YCloud sendDirectly — sends one carousel image per loop iteration

value.Plataformas: ={{ Array.isArray($('🔗 Merge Rehost Output').item.json.platforms) ? $('🔗 Merge Rehost Output').item.json.platforms.join(', ') : '' }}
value.Imagen_URL: ={{ ($('🔗 Merge Rehost Output').item.json.blob_urls && $('🔗 Merge Rehost Output').item.json.blob_urls[0] && $('🔗 Merge Rehost Output').item.json.blob_urls[0].url) || $('🔗 Merge Rehost Output').item.json.final_image_url || '' }}

nodes.name: 📤 Enviar preview imagen
nodes.notes: Single-post: sends image preview before text message

nodes.name: 📤 IG: Create Container
nodes.notes: Creates IG media container. Idempotent — retry is safe. Reads blob_urls[0].url (permanent Azure URL from Phase 4) and instagram.caption (from GPT-4o). Output: { id: <container_id> }. Common errors: 9004/2207052 (image_url unreachable), 190 (token expired).

nodes.name: ⏳ Wait 30s (container ready)
nodes.notes: Fixed 30s wait per IGPUB-03. Container typically reaches FINISHED in 2-5s for single photos, but 30s gives a safe margin. Phase 5 Success Criterion 5 requires this gap be visible in execution trace. Polling (HARD-03) deferred to v2.

nodes.name: 🚀 IG: media_publish
nodes.notes: CRITICAL: Retry DISABLED (IGPUB-04, ERR-02). media_publish is NOT idempotent — a retry after a timeout where Meta already processed the request creates a duplicate live IG post. If this node fails, execution aborts — Felix manually verifies IG profile and n8n logs. Error 9007/2207027 means container not ready (increase Wait).

nodes.name: 🔗 IG: Get Permalink
nodes.notes: GETs the published IG post's permalink (IGPUB-05). Input: { id: <media_id> } from media_publish. Output: { id, permalink }. Idempotent GET — retry is safe.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.YCLOUD_WHATSAPP_NUMBER, to: $('🔗 Merge Rehost Output').item.json.approval_number, type: 'text', text: { body: '✓ Publicado en Instagram y Facebook

Tema: ' + $('🔗 Merge Rehost Output').item.json.topic + '
Instagram: ' + $('🔗 IG: Get Permalink').item.json.permalink + '
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/' + $('🌐 FB: Publish Photo').item.json.post_id + '
Hora: ' + new Date().toISOString() } }) }}

nodes.name: ✅ Notify WhatsApp Success
nodes.notes: Sends WhatsApp text with 'Publicado' + IG permalink + timestamp (NOTIF-01). Cross-refs Merge Rehost Output for topic + approval_number because $json at this point is { id, permalink } from the permalink GET. Uses JSON.stringify({...}) wrapper per project pattern from commit effab36 to avoid quote-escaping issues.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $('🔗 Merge Rehost Output').item.json.blob_urls[0].url, message: $('🔗 Merge Rehost Output').item.json.facebook_caption || $('🔗 Merge Rehost Output').item.json.instagram_caption || '', access_token: $env.META_PAGE_TOKEN }) }}

nodes.name: 🌐 FB: Publish Photo
nodes.notes: CRITICAL: Retry DISABLED (FBPUB-01, ERR-02 equivalent). POST /{PAGE_ID}/photos is NOT idempotent — retry after timeout where Meta already processed creates a duplicate live FB post. Input: blob_urls[0].url from Merge Rehost Output. Output: { id: <photo_id>, post_id: '<page_id>_<photo_id>' }. Post_id used to construct FB_URL as 'https://www.facebook.com/' + post_id.

nodes.name: 🔀 ¿Formato Carrusel?
nodes.notes: Phase 7: Routes carousel briefs (format=carousel) to the carousel publish chain (TRUE output 0 — connected by Plan 02). Single-post briefs (format!=carousel) continue to the existing IG publish chain (FALSE output 1). Uses IF typeVersion 1 — v2/Switch v3 broken in n8n 2.14.2.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ session_id: 'propulsar_' + Date.now(), approval_number: $json.approval_number, topic: $json.topic, type: $json.type, angle: $json.angle || null, platforms: $json.platforms || [], image_model: $json.image_model || 'ideogram', format: 'carousel', image_urls: $json.image_urls, instagram_caption: $json.instagram_caption || ($json.instagram && $json.instagram.caption) || null, facebook_caption: $json.facebook_caption || ($json.facebook && $json.facebook.caption) || null, status: 'pending', publish_at: $json.publish_at || 'now' }) }}

nodes.name: 💾 Guardar sesión Supabase (Carousel)
nodes.notes: Inserts a carousel session into content_sessions BEFORE the WA preview is sent. Mirrors 💾 Guardar sesión Supabase (single-post). Uses format='carousel' and image_urls (JSONB array). retryOnFail=true — Supabase INSERT is idempotent by session_id (timestamp-based), safe to retry. Response = array of the inserted row.

assignments.name: instagram_caption
assignments.value: ={{ $('🗂️ Collect Image URLs').first().json.instagram_caption || ($('🗂️ Collect Image URLs').first().json.instagram && $('🗂️ Collect Image URLs').first().json.instagram.caption) || '' }}

assignments.name: facebook_caption
assignments.value: ={{ $('🗂️ Collect Image URLs').first().json.facebook_caption || ($('🗂️ Collect Image URLs').first().json.facebook && $('🗂️ Collect Image URLs').first().json.facebook.caption) || '' }}

nodes.name: 🔗 Re-attach carousel data
nodes.notes: Supabase HTTP Request replaced the item with the inserted row. Re-attaches the pre-insert carousel data via cross-ref to Collect Image URLs, plus session_id from the Supabase insert response. Mirrors 🔗 Re-attach session data on the single-post path. Downstream WA nodes (Split URLs WA, Preparar mensaje WA) need the original carousel data shape.

nodes.name: 🎠 IG: Explode Carousel Slides
nodes.notes: Explodes blob_urls array from Merge Rehost Output into one item per slide. Validates: not empty, not > 10 slides (Meta limit). Connected from TRUE output of ¿Formato Carrusel?.

nodes.name: 🖼️ IG: Create Child Container
nodes.notes: Creates one IG child container per carousel slide. is_carousel_item=true required by Meta. Idempotent — retry is safe. Runs once per slide (fan-out from Explode). Output: { id: <child_container_id> }.

nodes.name: 🗂️ IG: Collect Child IDs
nodes.notes: Aggregates all child container IDs after fan-out. Validates count matches expected. Builds children_csv for parent container. Cross-refs Merge Rehost Output for session metadata. Output: single item with full session + child_ids + children_csv.

nodes.name: ⏳ IG: Wait 30s Carousel
nodes.notes: 30s wait between child container creation and parent carousel container creation. Meta requires all child containers to reach FINISHED state before parent can be created. Same pattern as Wait 30s (container ready) on single-post path.

nodes.name: 🎠 IG: Create Parent Container
nodes.notes: Creates the IG carousel parent container using all child IDs (comma-separated). media_type=CAROUSEL required. Idempotent — retry is safe. Output: { id: <parent_container_id> }.

nodes.name: 🚀 IG: Carousel media_publish
nodes.notes: CRITICAL: Retry DISABLED. media_publish is NOT idempotent — retry after timeout where Meta already processed creates a duplicate live carousel post. creation_id = parent container id from previous node. Output: { id: <published_media_id> }.

nodes.name: 🔗 IG: Get Carousel Permalink
nodes.notes: GETs the published IG carousel post permalink. Idempotent GET — retry is safe. Output: { id, permalink }. Downstream FB chain uses cross-refs to Collect Child IDs for session data.

nodes.name: 🖼️ FB: Explode Carousel Slides
nodes.notes: Explodes blob_urls from Merge Rehost Output into per-slide items for FB unpublished photo upload. Mirrors IG: Explode Carousel Slides but simpler (no count validation — already done in IG chain).

nodes.name: 📤 FB: Upload Photo Unpublished
nodes.notes: CRITICAL: Retry DISABLED. POST /{PAGE_ID}/photos with published=false creates an unpublished photo that will be included in the multi-photo feed post. Not safe to retry after timeout — could create orphaned unpublished photos. Output: { id: <photo_id> }.

nodes.name: 🗂️ FB: Collect Photo IDs
nodes.notes: Aggregates all FB unpublished photo IDs after fan-out. Validates count. Cross-refs Merge Rehost Output for session data and IG: Get Carousel Permalink for instagram_permalink. Output: single item with full context needed for Publish Feed + WA notification + Sheets log.

nodes.name: 🔧 FB: Build attached_media
nodes.notes: Builds the attached_media array required by /feed multi-photo POST. Format: [{ media_fbid: photo_id }, ...]. Passes through all session data for downstream nodes.

nodes.name: 🌐 FB: Publish Carousel Feed
nodes.notes: CRITICAL: Retry DISABLED. POST /{PAGE_ID}/feed with attached_media is NOT idempotent — retry creates a duplicate live FB carousel post. Output: { id: <post_id> }. If this fails with 'Invalid parameter: attached_media', fallback is to switch specifyBody to 'string' and stringify the full body in Build attached_media.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.YCLOUD_WHATSAPP_NUMBER, to: $('🗂️ FB: Collect Photo IDs').first().json.approval_number, type: 'text', text: { body: '✅ Carrusel publicado (' + $('🗂️ FB: Collect Photo IDs').first().json.num_images + ' slides)

📸 Instagram: ' + $('🗂️ FB: Collect Photo IDs').first().json.instagram_permalink + '
📘 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/' + $json.id + '

📝 Tema: ' + $('🗂️ FB: Collect Photo IDs').first().json.topic } }) }}

nodes.name: ✅ Notify WhatsApp Carousel
nodes.notes: Sends carousel publish confirmation via WhatsApp. Cross-refs FB: Collect Photo IDs for session data (approval_number, num_images, instagram_permalink, topic). $json.id is the FB feed post_id from Publish Carousel Feed response. Retry is safe (WA message dedup by YCloud).

value.Plataformas: ={{ Array.isArray($('🗂️ FB: Collect Photo IDs').first().json.blob_urls) ? 'instagram, facebook' : '' }}
value.Imagen_URL: ={{ ($('🗂️ FB: Collect Photo IDs').first().json.blob_urls && $('🗂️ FB: Collect Photo IDs').first().json.blob_urls[0] && $('🗂️ FB: Collect Photo IDs').first().json.blob_urls[0].url) || '' }}

nodes.name: 📊 Google Sheets Log (Carousel)
nodes.notes: Appends a carousel publish log row to the same Log sheet as the single-post path. Uses same credentials (XjKteoOTobs1qR55) and schema. Cross-refs FB: Collect Photo IDs for session data, FB: Publish Carousel Feed for post_id. Same column schema as single-post log.

nodes.name: 🕐 Compute wait_seconds
nodes.notes: SCHED-03: Computes wait_seconds from publish_at. Routes to immediate if publish_at is now, past, <65s (n8n DB threshold), or >24h. 65s floor: n8n does not persist Wait < 65s to DB — container restart would lose execution.

nodes.name: ⏰ ¿Programado?
nodes.notes: SCHED-01: Routes scheduled=true to Wait path (output 0/TRUE), scheduled=false to immediate path (output 1/FALSE). Uses IF typeVersion 1 — v2/Switch v3 broken in n8n 2.14.2.

nodes.name: ⏳ Wait — Scheduled Publish
nodes.notes: SCHED-02: Pauses execution for wait_seconds (computed by 🕐 Compute wait_seconds). Uses 'After Time Interval' mode (amount + unit), NOT 'At Specified Time' (unreliable per n8n #14723). wait_seconds is a Number, not string.
